_comment: AI-Toolbox tool catalog — consumed by toolbox.{sh,ps1}. Each entry is an installable tool with a type that selects the install handler.

tools.name: component-audit
tools.description: Audit a codebase for component-orientation drift.

tools.name: discover
tools.description: Discover interesting recent videos across AI and dev topics.

tools.name: transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe a video or audio file — captions/Whisper, frames, diarization.

tools.name: gdrive
tools.description: Read Google-native files (.gsheet/.gdoc/.gslides pointers) from a Drive sync folder via Google MCP tools.

tools.name: fable-mode
tools.description: Five-phase Fable-grade reasoning protocol (Scope, Evidence, Attack, Verify, Report).

tools.name: idempotent-devops
tools.description: Scaffold, audit or verify-loop idempotent DevOps scripts.

tools.name: oracle-skill
tools.description: Set up + use an Oracle MCP server (SQLcl sql -mcp) for SQL data queries.

tools.name: single-file-spa
tools.description: Offline single-file SPA archetype in three tiers (monolith, file-linked, sections+build).

tools.name: doc-consistency
tools.description: Re-read guard + consistency propagation across coupled document artifacts (MD/Confluence/Jira).

tools.name: remote-deploy
tools.description: Deploy to legacy servers over SSH with offline vendoring, patches, verification and rollback.

tools.name: session-to-md
tools.description: Export a Claude Code session transcript (JSONL) as clean Markdown conversation.

tools.name: llm-provider
tools.description: Provider registry + HTTP call engine for LLM apps (dependency-free UMD, sibling checkout).

tools.name: full-rag
tools.description: Local hybrid RAG with GraphRAG — index a corpus, ask with citations (skill + CLI).

tools.name: cc-plugins
tools.description: SBB cc-plugins repo (customer-separated) — Atlassian, generator and SBB infra skills linked via toolbox.

tools.name: versioning-hooks
tools.description: Per-artifact version-bump git hooks (pre-commit + post-commit).

tools.name: claude-md
tools.description: Global Claude Code instructions (CLAUDE.md -> ~/.claude/).

tools.name: cli
tools.description: The toolbox CLI itself, as a system-wide 'toolbox' command.

tools.name: aiprofil
tools.description: Unified backend-profile switcher across Claude Code (env) + Kilo (kilo.jsonc).

tools.name: cc-profil
tools.description: Switch Claude Code env-var profiles (API key / endpoint / model).

tools.name: kilo-profil
tools.description: Point the Kilo Code config (kilo.jsonc) at a backend profile.
